58: func NewProxy(sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo, requestPath string, jwtMgr *JWTManager) (*Proxy, error) {

81: 		requestPath:  requestPath,

105: 	}

143: func (p *Proxy) setForwardingHeaders(req *http.Request) {
144: 	if req.Host != "" {
145: 		req.Header.Set(forwardedHostHeader, req.Host)
146: 	}
147:

77: 		workloadManagerURL: workloadManagerURL,
78: 		authToken:          authToken,
79: 		httpClient: &http.Client{
80: 			Timeout: 30 * time.Second,
81: 			Transport: &http.Transport{
82: 				TLSClientConfig: &tls.Config{
83: 					InsecureSkipVerify: true,
84: 				},
85: 			},
86: 		},
87: 	}, nil
88: }
89: 
90: func (m *manager) GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
91: 	if sessionID == "" {
92: 		return m.createSandbox(ctx, namespace, name, kind)
93: 	}
94: 
95: 	sandbox, err := m.store.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
96: 	if err != nil {
97: 		if errors.Is(err, store.ErrNotFound) {
98: 			return nil, api.NewSessionNotFoundError(sessionID)
99: 		}
100: 		return nil, err
101: 	}
102: 
103: 	return sandbox, nil
104: }
105: 
106: func (m *manager) createSandbox(ctx context.Context, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
107: 	req := types.CreateSandboxRequest{
108: 		Kind:      kind,
109: 		Name:      name,
110: 		Namespace: namespace,
111: 	}
112: 
113: 	reqBody, err := json.Marshal(req)
114: 	if err != nil {
115: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal request: %w", err)
116: 	}
117: 
118: 	var endpoint string
119: 	switch kind {
120: 	case types.AgentRuntimeKind:
121: 		endpoint = fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/agent-runtime", m.workloadManagerURL)
122: 	case types.CodeInterpreterKind:
123: 		endpoint = fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/code-interpreter", m.workloadManagerURL)
124: 	default:
125: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unknown kind: %s", kind)
126: 	}
127: 
128: 	httpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodPost, endpoint, bytes.NewReader(reqBody))
129: 	if err != nil {
130: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create request: %w", err)
131: 	}
132: 
133: 	httpReq.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
134: 	if m.authToken != "" {
135: 		httpReq.Header.Set("Authorization", fmt.Sprintf("Bearer %s", m.authToken))
136: 	}
137: 
138: 	resp, err := m.httpClient.Do(httpReq)
139: 	if err != nil {
140: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to call workload manager: %w", err)
141: 	}
142: 	defer resp.Body.Close()
143: 
144: 	if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
145: 		if resp.StatusCode == http.StatusNotFound {
146: 			return nil, api.NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(namespace, name, kind)
147: 		}
148: 		body, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
149: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("workload manager returned status %d: %s", resp.StatusCode, string(body))
150: 	}
151: 
152: 	var createResp types.CreateSandboxResponse
153: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&createResp); err != nil {
154: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to decode response: %w", err)
155: 	}
156: 
157: 	if createResp.SessionID == "" {
158: 		return nil, ErrEmptySessionID
159: 	}
160: 
161: 	sandboxInfo := &types.SandboxInfo{
162: 		Kind:        kind,
163: 		SandboxID:   createResp.SandboxID,
164: 		Name:        createResp.SandboxName,
165: 		SessionID:   createResp.SessionID,
166: 		EntryPoints: createResp.EntryPoints,
167: 		CreatedAt:   time.Now(),
168: 	}
169: 
170: 	return sandboxInfo, nil
171: }

32: func main() {
33: 	port := flag.Int("port", 8080, "HTTP server port")
34: 	debug := flag.Bool("debug", false, "Enable debug mode")
35: 	enableTLS := flag.Bool("tls", false, "Enable TLS")
36: 	tlsCert := flag.String("tls-cert", "", "TLS certificate file path")
37: 	tlsKey := flag.String("tls-key", "", "TLS key file path")
38: 	maxConcurrent := flag.Int("max-concurrent", 1000, "Maximum concurrent requests")
39: 
40: 	flag.Parse()
41: 
42: 	klog.InitFlags(nil)
43: 	defer klog.Flush()
44: 
45: 	cfg := &router.Config{
46: 		Port:                  *port,
47: 		Debug:                 *debug,
48: 		EnableTLS:             *enableTLS,
49: 		TLSCert:               *tlsCert,
50: 		TLSKey:                *tlsKey,
51: 		MaxConcurrentRequests: *maxConcurrent,
52: 	}
53: 
54: 	if err := cfg.Validate(); err != nil {
55: 		klog.Fatalf("Invalid configuration: %v", err)
56: 	}
57: 
58: 	klog.Info("Initializing store...")
59: 	if err := initStore(); err != nil {
60: 		klog.Fatalf("Failed to initialize store: %v", err)
61: 	}
62: 
63: 	klog.Info("Creating server...")
64: 	server, err := router.NewServer(cfg)
65: 	if err != nil {
66: 		klog.Fatalf("Failed to create server: %v", err)
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
70: 	defer cancel()
71: 
72: 	sigCh := make(chan os.Signal, 1)
73: 	signal.Notify(sigCh, syscall.SIGINT, syscall.SIGTERM)
74: 
75: 	go func() {
76: 		sig := <-sigCh
77: 		klog.Infof("Received signal %v, shutting down...", sig)
78: 		cancel()
79: 	}()
80: 
81: 	klog.Info("Starting server...")
82: 	if err := server.Start(ctx); err != nil && err != http.ErrServerClosed {
83: 		klog.Fatalf("Server error: %v", err)
84: 	}
85: 
86: 	<-ctx.Done()
87: 	klog.Info("Server stopped")
88: }
